/usr/bin/ar qc libmeshoptimizer.a CMakeFiles/meshoptimizer.dir/extern/meshoptimizer/src/allocator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshoptimizer.dir/extern/meshoptimizer/src/clusterizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshoptimizer.dir/extern/meshoptimizer/src/indexanalyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshoptimizer.dir/extern/meshoptimizer/src/indexcodec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshoptimizer.dir/extern/meshoptimizer/src/indexgenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshoptimizer.dir/extern/meshoptimizer/src/meshletcodec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshoptimizer.dir/extern/meshoptimizer/src/meshletutils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshoptimizer.dir/extern/meshoptimizer/src/overdrawoptimizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshoptimizer.dir/extern/meshoptimizer/src/partition.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshoptimizer.dir/extern/meshoptimizer/src/quantization.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshoptimizer.dir/extern/meshoptimizer/src/rasterizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshoptimizer.dir/extern/meshoptimizer/src/simplifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshoptimizer.dir/extern/meshoptimizer/src/spatialorder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshoptimizer.dir/extern/meshoptimizer/src/stripifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshoptimizer.dir/extern/meshoptimizer/src/vcacheoptimizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshoptimizer.dir/extern/meshoptimizer/src/vertexcodec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshoptimizer.dir/extern/meshoptimizer/src/vertexfilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshoptimizer.dir/extern/meshoptimizer/src/vfetchoptimizer.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmeshoptimizer.a
